tool.name: WebAtlas Build Vitessce Config
tool.description: from AnnData and image Zarr inputs
tool.command: python "$images_script" && python "$options_script" && /usr/local/bin/build_config.py --project '$project' --dataset '$dataset' --file_paths '["/api/datasets/${__app__.security.encode_id($input_file_path.id)}/extra_files/raw/$input_file_path.metadata.store_root/"]' --images "\$(cat images.json)" --url ${__app__.config.galaxy_infrastructure_url} --options "\$(cat options.json)" --layout '$layout' #if $custom_layout: --custom_layout '$custom_layout' #end if #if $title: --title '$title' #end if #if $description: --description '$description' #end if #if $config_filename_suffix: --config_filename_suffix '$config_filename_suffix' #end if && mv $project-$dataset-'$config_filename_suffix'* $output_json

configfiles.configfile:
import json
images = {"raw": [], "label": []}
#if $sec_label_img.input_image_label and $sec_label_img.input_metadata_label and $sec_label_img.image_name_label label_zarr_path = "/api/datasets/${__app__.security.encode_id($sec_label_img.input_image_label.id)}/extra_files/raw/${sec_label_img.input_image_label.metadata.store_root}/" label_metadata_path = "${sec_label_img.input_metadata_label}" label_image_name = "${sec_label_img.image_name_label}"
with open(label_metadata_path) as md_file: label_md = json.load(md_file)
images["label"].append({ "path": label_zarr_path, "name": f"{label_image_name}-label", "md": label_md }) #end if
#if $sec_raw_img.input_image_raw and $sec_raw_img.input_metadata_raw and $sec_raw_img.image_name_raw raw_zarr_path = "/api/datasets/${__app__.security.encode_id($sec_raw_img.input_image_raw.id)}/extra_files/raw/${sec_raw_img.input_image_raw.metadata.store_root}/" raw_metadata_path = "${sec_raw_img.input_metadata_raw}" raw_image_name = "${sec_raw_img.image_name_raw}"
with open(raw_metadata_path) as md_file: raw_md = json.load(md_file)
images["raw"].append({ "path": raw_zarr_path, "name": f"{raw_image_name}-raw", "md": raw_md }) #end if
clean_dict = {} for key, value in images.items(): if value: clean_dict[key] = value images = clean_dict
with open("images.json", "w") as file: json.dump(images, file)

import json
options = {}
spatial = "${sec_vitessce_options.spatial}".strip() factors= "${sec_vitessce_options.factors}".strip() sets = "${sec_vitessce_options.sets}".strip() matrix = "${sec_vitessce_options.matrix}".strip()
## spatial if spatial: options["spatial"] = { "xy": f"obsm/{spatial}" }
## mappings mappings = {}
#if $sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_spatial.mappings_spatial == "true" and $sec_vitessce_options.spatial: spatial_dim1 = "${sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_spatial.spatial_dim1}" spatial_dim2 = "${sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_spatial.spatial_dim2}" if spatial_dim1 != "" and spatial_dim2 != "": mappings[f"obsm/{spatial}"] = [int(spatial_dim1), int(spatial_dim2)] #end if
#if $sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_pca.pca_value: pca_value = "${sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_pca.pca_value}" pca_dim1 = "${sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_pca.pca_dim1}" pca_dim2 = "${sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_pca.pca_dim2}" if pca_dim1 != "" and pca_dim2 != "": mappings[f"obsm/{pca_value}"] = [int(pca_dim1), int(pca_dim2)] #end if
#if $sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_umap.umap_value: umap_value = "${sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_umap.umap_value}" umap_dim1 = "${sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_umap.umap_dim1}" umap_dim2 = "${sec_vitessce_options.sec_mappings_umap.umap_dim2}" if umap_dim1 != "" and umap_dim2 != "": mappings[f"obsm/{umap_value}"] = [int(umap_dim1), int(umap_dim2)] #end if
if mappings: options["mappings"] = mappings
## factors if factors: options["factors"] = [f"obs/{f.strip()}" for f in factors.split(",") if f.strip()]
## sets if sets: parsed_sets = []
for s in sets.split(","): s = s.strip() if not s: continue
if ":" in s: name, score = [x.strip() for x in s.split(":", 1)] parsed_sets.append({"name": f"obs/{name}","score": f"obs/{score}"}) else: parsed_sets.append(f"obs/{s}") if parsed_sets: options["sets"] = parsed_sets
## matrix if matrix: options["matrix"] = matrix
with open("options.json", "w") as file: json.dump(options, file, indent=2)

param.name: input_file_path
param.label: AnnData Zarr generated by WebAtlas Process files

param.name: input_image_label
param.label: Image Zarr generated by WebAtlas Consolidate Metadata

param.name: input_metadata_label
param.label: Metadata JSON generated by WebAtlas OME Zarr Metadata

param.name: image_name_label
param.label: Image name (prefix)
param.help: Display name prefix used inside Vitessce. Should be the same as the 'prefix' used in other WebAtlas tools. E.g. 'visium-breast-cancer'.

param.name: input_image_raw
param.label: Image Zarr generated by WebAtlas Consolidate Metadata

param.name: input_metadata_raw
param.label: Metadata JSON generated by WebAtlas OME Zarr Metadata

param.name: image_name_raw
param.label: Image name (prefix)
param.help: Display name prefix used inside Vitessce. Should be the same as the 'prefix' used in other WebAtlas tools. E.g. 'visium-breast-cancer'.

param.name: project
param.label: Project name
param.help: Displayed in the config metadata and used in the output filename.

param.name: dataset
param.label: Dataset name
param.help: Displayed in the config metadata and used in the output filename.

param.label: Layout
param.help: Predefined Vitessce layout to use. Default: minimal.

param.name: spatial
param.label: Where the AnnData object stores the spatial coordinates
param.help: Examples: 'spatial', 'X_spatial'. 'xy: obsm/' gets prepended automatically.

param.name: mappings_spatial
param.label: Include spatial in scatterplot
param.help: Provide values for the following 2 dimensions if you choose 'Yes' here.

param.name: spatial_dim1
param.label: Spatial dimension 1
param.help: First dimension to be plotted.

param.name: spatial_dim2
param.label: Spatial dimension 2
param.help: Second dimension to be plotted.

param.name: pca_value
param.label: Where the PCA is stored
param.help: Includes PCA in scatterplot. Example: 'X_pca'. 'obsm/' gets prepended automatically. Provide values for the following 2 dimensions if enter a value here.

param.name: pca_dim1
param.label: PCA Dimension 1
param.help: First dimension to be plotted (e.g. PC1)

param.name: pca_dim2
param.label: PCA Dimension 2
param.help: Second dimension to be plotted (e.g. PC2)

param.name: umap_value
param.label: Where the UMAP is stored
param.help: Includes UMAP in scatterplot. Example: 'X_umap'. 'obsm/' gets prepended automatically. Provide values for the following 2 dimensions if you enter a value here.

param.name: umap_dim1
param.label: UMAP Dimension 1
param.help: First dimension to be plotted.

param.name: umap_dim2
param.label: UMAP Dimension 2
param.help: Second dimension to be plotted.

param.name: factors
param.label: Factors
param.help: Comma-separated list of 'obs' fields to show when hovering over cells in the visualization. Example input: sample. 'obs/' gets prepended automatically.

param.name: sets
param.label: Sets
param.help: Comma-separated list of keys for grouping cells. Use 'name' for simple sets or 'name:score' for scored sets. Example: 'cluster, celltype:celltype_prob'.

param.name: matrix
param.label: Matrix
param.help: Expression matrix to use in the Vitessce config. Default: X.

param.label: Title
param.help: Data title to show in the visualization.

param.label: Description
param.help: Description to include in the config file.

param.label: Config filename suffix
param.help: Default value: config.json

param.label: Custom layout
param.help: String defining a Vitessce layout following its alternative syntax. https://vitessce.github.io/vitessce-python/api_config.html#vitessce.config.VitessceConfig.layout https://github.com/vitessce/vitessce-python/blob/1e100e4f3f6b2389a899552dffe90716ffafc6d5/vitessce/config.py#L855

param.name: title
param.value: Visium CytAssist - High resolution mapping of the breast cancer tumor microenvironment

has_text_matching.expression: "name": "Visium CytAssist - High resolution mapping of the breast cancer tumor microenvironment",

param.name: title
param.value: Visium CytAssist - High resolution mapping of the breast cancer tumor microenvironment

has_text_matching.expression: "name": "Visium CytAssist - High resolution mapping of the breast cancer tumor microenvironment",

param.name: title
param.value: Visium CytAssist - High resolution mapping of the breast cancer tumor microenvironment

has_text_matching.expression: "name": "Visium CytAssist - High resolution mapping of the breast cancer tumor microenvironment",
